LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER NORMAN VORTIGY'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THE WISE LETTER IS NOT A STATEMENT UNDER OATH AND MAY NOT BE CONSIDERED AS EVIDENCE. THE GRANT DEED DOES NOT ADDRESS THE QUESTION OF THE ISSUANCE OF MEMBERSHIPS. MR. VORTIGY'S CONCERNS ARE APPROPRIATELY ADDRESSED BY THE OFFICE OF THE ATTORNEY GENERAL. THE TIME TO OBJECT TO THE FORM OF THE PRIOR ORDER HAS EXPIRED UNDER RULES OF COURT 391(A). THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
